findings.title: n8n Ni8mare Unauthenticated RCE Chain (CVSS 10.0)
findings.summary: Unauthenticated file read chained with expression injection sandbox bypass for full RCE on n8n; public automated exploit available, internet-facing instances exposed.

findings.title: GNU inetutils telnetd Unauthenticated RCE
findings.summary: 11-year-old bug in telnetd allows remote root shell via malformed USER environment variable; public PoC and batch scanning tool available.

findings.title: osTicket Arbitrary File Read + CNEXT RCE Chain
findings.summary: PHP filter abuse via mPDF for arbitrary file read chained with glibc iconv exploit for full RCE; complete Horizon3.ai exploit toolkit published.

findings.title: AdonisJS Bodyparser Path Traversal — Arbitrary File Write
findings.summary: Critical path traversal allowing arbitrary file writing on servers using AdonisJS bodyparser; public PoC available.

findings.title: node-tar Arbitrary File Overwrite
findings.summary: Arbitrary file overwrite via crafted tar archive in node-tar versions below 7.5.3; public PoC available.

findings.title: ShinyHunters SSO Vishing Campaign — 100+ Organizations Targeted
findings.summary: ShinyHunters targeting SSO accounts at 100+ orgs via voice phishing with real-time MFA relay; confirmed breaches at Optimizely, Canada Goose, Panera Bread, SoundCloud.

findings.title: Phoenix Contact TC Router Command Injection
findings.summary: Authenticated command injection in Phoenix Contact industrial routers; patched in firmware 1.06.23.

noted.summary: Local privilege escalation via DYLIB injection; UNPATCHED, vendor unresponsive.
February Linux Patch Wednesday: 632 CVEs patched including 305 in kernel.
RCE vulnerability patched in February Linux updates.
Odido (Dutch telecom) breach claimed; Ticketmaster 560M record breach confirmed.
North Korean APT linked to Medusa ransomware attacks on US healthcare.
